references.borrowed: Browser specs record console errors and failed requests, mirroring Playwright network-event guidance.
references.rejected: No live external API mocking was added because task 465 uses local deterministic fixtures.

references.borrowed: Playwright helper captures traces and writes a failure trace when assertions fail.
references.rejected: Trace files are local evidence only; they are not used as proof hashes.

references.borrowed: The UI suite captures normal, elevated, critical, stale, degraded, and quarantined screenshots.
references.rejected: Screenshots do not substitute for machine-readable expected outcomes.

references.borrowed: The Playwright helper writes ARIA or body-text snapshots for heatmap and breach UI surfaces.
references.rejected: ARIA snapshots are supporting evidence, not the source of projection truth.

references.borrowed: The deterministic runner records a perf_hooks probe for harness runtime observability.
references.rejected: perf_hooks timing is not used for pass/fail because the load model is virtual and deterministic.

references.borrowed: Dashboard tests assert table parity, keyboard access, and accessible summaries for heatmap-like operational visualisations.
references.rejected: The external dashboard guidance does not override local Phase 9 projection and fail-closed rules.

references.borrowed: Heatmap assertions pair colour-coded pressure with text, table values, and deterministic ordering.
Keyboard and status-state checks target perceivable, operable, understandable operations surfaces.
references.rejected: WCAG conformance is not treated as sufficient for clinical/operational truth.

references.borrowed: The suite covers reduced motion and visible control posture changes for healthcare-service consistency.

references.borrowed: Expected outcomes keep explicit key/value-style summaries for evidence and fallback comparisons.
